escalation_level: Immediate - CISO + Executive Leadership + Board (if applicable)
criteria: Complete service outage; confirmed data breach of highly sensitive data (PII, PHI, financial); ransomware encryption in progress; APT with confirmed exfiltration; compromise of critical infrastructure; active exploitation of zero-day vulnerability; nation-state actor confirmed
business_impact: Revenue loss > $1M; regulatory fines imminent; brand damage; customer data exposed; operations halted; legal liability
notification_requirements: IMMEDIATE: CISO, CEO, Legal, Board (within 1 hour); Regulatory (GDPR 72h, state breach laws); Law enforcement (FBI, IC3); Cyber insurance; Affected customers (per regulations)

criteria: Partial service degradation; suspected data breach; malware outbreak affecting multiple systems; successful phishing campaign; account compromise (privileged accounts); DDoS causing service impact; confirmed but contained threat actor activity
business_impact: Revenue loss $100K-$1M; customer impact; SLA violations; productivity loss; containment in progress
notification_requirements: Within 4 hours: CISO, IT Director, Legal, HR (if insider threat); Regulatory (if PII involved); Law enforcement (if criminal activity); Customers (if data exposure suspected)

criteria: Isolated malware infection; failed phishing attempts; policy violations; suspicious activity requiring investigation; vulnerability exploitation attempts; minor data exposure (internal only); single system compromise
business_impact: Revenue loss $10K-$100K; limited user impact; no customer data at risk; isolated systems affected
notification_requirements: Within 24 hours: Security Manager, IT Manager; Management (if trends emerge); No external notifications unless investigation reveals escalation

criteria: Security alerts requiring validation; minor policy violations; failed login attempts; spam/nuisance activity; non-malicious false positives; informational events
business_impact: Minimal to no business impact; no revenue loss; standard operations continue; monitoring only
notification_requirements: Internal team only; Manager notification (weekly summary); No external notifications required
